lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: Thank you for rescuing my scorpions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You said you'd enchant my battlestaff for me.

lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: Yes, it'll cost you [20,000 / 30,000 / 40,000] coins for the materials needed though. Which sort of staff did you want enchanting?
